locator.quote: a golden harness must canonicalise opaque random identifiers

text: A golden harness must canonicalise opaque random identifiers (uuid pair_id) to structural equivalence, or self-parity false-alarms.
cProfile would have lied (inflates wall ~50%, misses the batched collector); per-phase perf_counter timers on the real path did not.

locator.quote: is a random uuid → comparator now compares pairing STRUCTURE not the string.

text: The golden harness caught a real nondeterminism on run #1: pair_id is a random uuid → the comparator now compares pairing STRUCTURE not the string.

locator.quote: reproduces committed fixtures bit-for-bit; (b) an injected 1-tick matcher price

text: Both golden gates pass 9/9: (a) current env reproduces committed fixtures bit-for-bit; (b) an injected 1-tick matcher price shift is caught end-to-end.
